source_to_correction_map.corrective_upper_root_datum: v0 = - c0^2 / (2 * A_bulk(alpha_1, alpha_1)) * (kappa_R * psi_R + kappa_I * psi_I)

if_A_bulk_alpha1_alpha1_equals_1.meaning: In the normalized model, one unit of lower-root source coefficient is cancelled by minus one-half unit of cubic upper-root datum in the matching coordinate.

what_this_does_not_do: It does not compute kappa_R or kappa_I.
It does not bound the O(rho^(3/2)) tail.
It does not certify the full nonlinear source term.
